nasb.text: But if it has any defect, such as lameness or blindness, or any serious defect, you shall not sacrifice it to the Lord your God.

esv.text: But if it has any blemish, if it is lame or blind or has any serious blemish whatever, you shall not sacrifice it to the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 這頭生的，如果有甚麼殘疾，像瘸腿或是瞎眼，無論有任何嚴重的殘疾，你都不可獻給耶和華你的　神。

ccb.text: 如果这些牛羊有什么残疾，如瘸腿、瞎眼或其他残疾，就不可献给你们的上帝耶和华。
